final_prompt.prompt:
Create a WeChat Official Account article cover for a fragrance product launch.

Style/medium: needs a "高级质感风" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Aesop brand identity heritage, Kinfolk magazine editorial photography, 侘寂 (wabi-sabi) material sensibility; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be centered composition with the headline as the focal point
Subject: must include "染秋" fragrance new product launch as the theme
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a refined, contemplative autumn atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs an autumnal direction — exact hex values are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "染秋 - 秋意染染 时光留香" as the headline (prominently centered)
Constraints: must preserve 900x500 aspect ratio
Avoid:
